hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"file_path":.*agents/'; then echo '>> AGENTS_GUIDE.md reminder: ensure the agent follows the BaseAgent contract. Validate prerequisites, write to context, handle errors gracefully, return context.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"file_path":.*prompts/'; then echo '>> PROMPTS_GUIDE.md reminder: prompts must have Role, Task, Input, Output Format, and Rules sections.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'pytest'; then echo '>> Tests ran. If all passed, consider updating LEARNINGS.md with any new concepts introduced.'; fi
echo '>> Session ended. Remember to: 1) commit your changes, 2) update LEARNINGS.md if new AI concepts were introduced, 3) run pytest tests/ before pushing.'
